description: Lightweight MongoDB GUI client built with Electron. Browse, query, CRUD.

stories.title: Project Scaffold + Config
stories.description: Scaffold electron-vite project with react-ts template. Install all deps (mongodb, electron-store, zustand, vitest, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/jest-dom, jsdom). Setup Tailwind + shadcn/ui components (button, dialog, table, input, scroll-area, collapsible, sonner). Configure dual vitest: main (node env) and renderer (jsdom env). Create shared types file at src/shared/types.ts (Result<T>, DbInfo, CollectionInfo, FindOpts, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm dev opens Electron window
pnpm test runs successfully (no tests yet, zero failures)
Tailwind classes render in dev mode
src/shared/types.ts exports Result<T>, DbInfo, CollectionInfo, FindOpts types
vitest.config.ts configured for node (main) and jsdom (renderer) environments

stories.title: MongoService TDD
stories.description: TDD the MongoService class (src/main/mongo-service.ts). RED: Write mongo-service.test.ts with mocked mongodb driver. GREEN: Implement MongoService. REFACTOR: Clean up.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: connect() calls MongoClient.connect with URI
TEST: connect() with bad URI returns error result
TEST: disconnect() closes client
TEST: listDatabases() returns DbInfo[]
TEST: listDatabases() when not connected throws
TEST: listCollections(db) returns CollectionInfo[]
TEST: find(db, coll, opts) returns serialized docs + totalCount
TEST: count(db, coll, filter) returns number
TEST: EJSON serialization - ObjectId/Date round-trip correctly
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: IPC + Preload Bridge
stories.description: TDD the IPC handlers and preload bridge. RED: Write ipc-handlers.test.ts with mocked MongoService. GREEN: Implement ipc-handlers.ts, preload/index.ts, preload/index.d.ts. REFACTOR: DRY up handler registration.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: Each IPC channel calls correct MongoService method
TEST: Success returns { ok: true, data }
TEST: MongoService error returns { ok: false, error: message }
TEST: EJSON serialization applied to outgoing data
preload/index.ts exposes typed API via contextBridge
preload/index.d.ts declares window.api types
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: Zustand Store TDD
stories.description: TDD the zustand store (src/renderer/src/store.ts). RED: Write store.test.ts with mocked window.api. GREEN: Implement store. REFACTOR: Clean up.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: connect(uri) sets connected=true, loads databases
TEST: connect failure sets error, connected=false
TEST: selectDb(db) loads collections
TEST: selectCollection(db, coll) loads docs
TEST: disconnect() resets state
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: Connection Dialog + Sidebar
stories.description: TDD the ConnectionDialog and Sidebar UI components. RED: Write ConnectionDialog.test.tsx and Sidebar.test.tsx. GREEN: Implement components + App.tsx layout. REFACTOR: Extract shared patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: ConnectionDialog renders URI input and Connect button
TEST: Submit calls store.connect
TEST: Shows error toast on connection failure
TEST: Hides dialog on successful connection
TEST: Sidebar renders database list
TEST: Click DB expands to show collections
TEST: Click collection calls store.selectCollection
TEST: Shows selected collection as active
App.tsx renders sidebar + main panel layout
Error toasts work via shadcn sonner
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: Document Table
stories.description: TDD the DocumentTable component. RED: Write DocumentTable.test.tsx. GREEN: Implement DocumentTable.tsx. REFACTOR: Extract column detection utility if complex.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: Renders column headers from doc keys (union of first 20 docs)
TEST: Renders _id column first
TEST: Truncates long cell values (>100 chars)
TEST: JSON.stringifies nested objects in cells
TEST: Shows pagination controls (Next/Prev/page info)
TEST: Next button disabled on last page
TEST: Prev button disabled on first page
TEST: Calls store with updated skip on page change
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: Saved Connections
stories.description: TDD saved connection persistence using electron-store with encryption. RED: Write tests. GREEN: Implement. REFACTOR: Clean up.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: electron-store saves { name, uri }[] with encryption
TEST: ConnectionDialog renders saved connections list
TEST: Click saved connection fills URI and connects
TEST: Delete removes connection from store
TEST: Last-used connection auto-reconnects on app start
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: Query Editor
stories.description: TDD the QueryEditor component with CodeMirror 6. RED: Write QueryEditor.test.tsx. GREEN: Implement QueryEditor.tsx + aggregate IPC. REFACTOR: Extract JSON validation utility.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: Renders CodeMirror editor
TEST: Run button parses JSON filter and calls store.find with filter
TEST: Invalid JSON shows error toast
TEST: Aggregate mode parses JSON array, calls store.aggregate
TEST: Cmd+Enter triggers run
TEST: Toggle between filter/aggregate mode
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: Document CRUD
stories.description: TDD document create/edit/delete. RED: Write DocumentEditor.test.tsx. GREEN: Implement DocumentEditor.tsx + CRUD IPC handlers. REFACTOR: Clean up.
acceptanceCriteria: TEST: Add Document button opens editor dialog with empty template
TEST: Submit calls insert-one, refreshes table
TEST: Click row opens editor with doc JSON
TEST: Save calls update-one, refreshes table
TEST: Delete button shows confirm, calls delete-one, refreshes table
TEST: Invalid JSON in editor shows error
All tests pass with pnpm test

stories.title: Polish
stories.description: UI polish pass: loading states, empty states, keyboard shortcuts, dark mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Loading spinners on all async operations
Empty states for no DBs, no collections, no docs
Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+K connect, Cmd+Enter run query
Collection doc count badge in sidebar
Dark mode with system preference detection
Resizable sidebar with drag handle
